Function Documentation

◆ INITIALIZE_PASS() [1/3]

INITIALIZE_PASS ( CFGOnlyPrinter ,
"dot-cfg-only" ,
"Print CFG of function to 'dot' file (with no function bodies)" ,
false ,
true  )

viewCFG - This function is meant for use from the debugger. You can just say 'call F->viewCFG()' and a ghostview window should pop up from the program, displaying the CFG of the current function. This depends on there being a 'dot' and 'gv' program in your path. viewCFGOnly - This function is meant for use from the debugger. It works just like viewCFG, but it does not include the contents of basic blocks into the nodes, just the label. If you are only interested in the CFG this can make the graph smaller.
